title: Influenza A, B Amplicon-Based Sequencing Protocol Using Illumina DNA Preplibrary Preparation
author: Judit Henczkó
materials: Invitrogen SuperScript III One-Step RT-PCR System

steps.title: RNA extraction Samples were extracted using...
steps.instruction: RNA extraction Samples were extracted using QIAamp Viral RNA Mini kit (Catalog # 52904). Real time RT-PCR (CDC 2009) was performed on all samples to determine viral load with Cycle threshold (Ct) value. Samples with a Ct value <32 are recommended for optimal results. RNA integrity affect the quality and the yield of Library!

steps.title: Nuclease-Free Water Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM9932
steps.instruction: Nuclease-Free Water Thermo Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM9932

steps.title: Take the beads to room temperature before use
steps.instruction: Take the beads to room temperature before use!

steps.title: Shake the AMPure XP bottle to...
steps.instruction: Shake the AMPure XP bottle to resuspend any magnetic particles that may have settled. Then add 1,8x AMPure XP reagent.

steps.title: Mix reagent and sample thoroughly by pipette mixing 10 times
steps.instruction: Mix reagent and sample thoroughly by pipette mixing 10 times. Let the mixed samples incubate for 5 minutes at room temperature for maximum recovery.

steps.title: Place the reaction plate onto the...
steps.instruction: Place the reaction plate onto the SPRIPlate 96R Ring Super Magnet Plate for 2 minutes to separate beads from the solution. Wait for the solution to clear before proceeding to the next step.

steps.title: Perform this step with the reaction...
steps.instruction: Perform this step with the reaction plate situated on the SPRIPlate 96R Ring Super Magnet Plate. Do not disturb the separated magnetic beads. Also, be sure to remove all of the ethanol from the bottom of the well. Dispense 200 μL of 80% ethanol to each well of the reaction plate and incubate for 30 seconds at room temperature. Aspirate out the ethanol and discard.

steps.title: Repeat for a total of two washes
steps.instruction: Repeat for a total of two washes.

steps.title: Dry the beads and do not...
steps.instruction: Dry the beads and do not over dry the bead ring (bead ring appears cracked if over dried) as this will significantly decrease elution efficiency.

steps.title: Remove the reaction plate from the...
steps.instruction: Remove the reaction plate from the magnet plate, and then add 52 μL of elution buffer (RNAse/DNAse-free water) to each well of the reaction plate and pipette mix 10 times. Incubate for 2 minutes. 9.Place the reaction plate onto the SPRIPlate 96R Ring Super Magnet Plate for 1 minute to separate beads from the solution.

steps.title: Transfer 50 ul of the eluate to a new plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 50 ul of the eluate to a new plate.

steps.title: Remove the plate seal
steps.instruction: Remove the plate seal. Add 10ul of TSB to each sample ( Use a multi-channel pipette) and gently pipette up and down 10 times to mix and fully resuspend the beads in the 50 μl reaction. Apply an adhesive PCR plate seal to the plate. Place the plate into the thermocyler and incubate at for 37 °C followed by a 10 °C hold While samples are incubating, thaw EPM on ice. Remove the plate from the thermocycler, quick spin the plate and remove the seal. Place the plate on a magnet and incubate it until solution is clear. Using a multichannel pipette, remove the supernatant and discard. Remove the plate from the magnet and add of TWB directly to the pellet. Gently pipette to mix until beads are fully resuspended, try to avoid creation of foam from TWB. Place the plate on the magnet for or until solution is clear. Remove the supernatant and discard. Remove the plate from the magnet and add of TWB directly to the pellet. Gently pipette to mix until beads are fully resuspended. Place the plate on the magnet for 00:03:00 or until solution is clear. Remove the supernatant and discard. Remove the plate from the magnet and add 100 µL of TWB directly to the pellet. Gently pipette to mix until beads are fully resuspended. Place the plate with TWB on the magnet and avoid overdrying and incubate until ready to proceed with adding the PCR master mix in the Amplify Tagmented DNA step.

steps.title: Reagents
steps.instruction: Reagents: Invitrogen‱ SuperScript‱ III One-Step RT-PCR System with Platinum‱TaqHigh Fidelity DNA Polymerase (cat. no. 12574035) Oligos for amplicon generation (7,8): %s %s PCR mix: %s %s * scale up if needed PCR conditions: %s %s Note: Keep all components, reaction mixes, and samples on ice. After preparation of the samples, transfer them to the preheated thermal cycler and immediately start the RT–PCR program. If the ct vaue is higher than the expected <32, scale up reactions

steps.title: Gently pipette up and down 10 times
steps.instruction: Gently pipette up and down 10 times

steps.title: Centrifuge down the samples (gently)
steps.instruction: Centrifuge down the samples (gently)

steps.title: Incubate the samples as a follows
steps.instruction: Incubate the samples as a follows: 37 °C 15:00 min 10 °C

steps.title: Remove and discard TWB
steps.instruction: Remove and discard TWB. Avoid overdrying!

steps.title: Add 40 ul EPM mix to the beads
steps.instruction: Add 40 ul EPM mix to the beads.

steps.title: Add 10 ul Illumina UD index...
steps.instruction: Add 10 ul Illumina UD index to the mix Illumina® DNA/RNA UD Indexes Set A, B, C, D Tagmentation (96 Indexes, 96 Samples) Illumina, Inc. Catalog #20091654, 20091656, 20091658, 20 Incubate as a follows: PCR conditions: %s %s

steps.title: Quantify samples using the Qubit dsDNA High Sensitivity kit
steps.instruction: Quantify samples using the Qubit dsDNA High Sensitivity kit. See SOP titled“DNA Quantification using the Qubit Fluorometer” for more detailed information on performing DNA quantification.

steps.title: DNAse digestion by using Turbo DNAse...
steps.instruction: DNAse digestion by using Turbo DNAse TURBO DNase 2 U/uL Fisher Scientific Catalog #AM2239 Create a master mix of Turbe DNAse: Add 1 μL TURBO DNase (2 U) (for up to 10 μg RNA in a 50 μL reaction), 5µL TURBO DNase Buffer, and 14µL of H2O per sample. 30:00 min 37 °C

steps.title: Place the plate on the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the plate on the magnetic stand and wait until the liquid is clear (~5 minutes).

steps.title: Transfer 45 µl supernatant from each...
steps.instruction: Transfer 45 µl supernatant from each well of the a PCR plate.

steps.title: Add 40 µl nuclease-free water to each well-containing supernatant
steps.instruction: Add 40 µl nuclease-free water to each well-containing supernatant.

steps.title: Add 45 µl IPB to each well-containing supernatant
steps.instruction: Add 45 µl IPB to each well-containing supernatant.

steps.title: Pipette each well 10 times to mix
steps.instruction: Pipette each well 10 times to mix.

steps.title: Seal the plate and incubate at...
steps.instruction: Seal the plate and incubate at room temperature for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Place on the magnetic stand and...
steps.instruction: Place on the magnetic stand and wait until the liquid is clear (~5 minutes).

steps.title: Add 15 µl to each well...
steps.instruction: Add 15 µl to each well of a new MIDI plate.

steps.title: Transfer 125 µl supernatant from each...
steps.instruction: Transfer 125 µl supernatant from each well the new MIDI plate containing 15 µl IPB.

steps.title: Incubate the sealed MIDI plate at...
steps.instruction: Incubate the sealed MIDI plate at room temperature for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Place on the magnetic stand and...
steps.instruction: Place on the magnetic stand and waituntil the liquid is clear (~5 minutes).

steps.title: Without disturbing the beads, remove and discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Without disturbing the beads, remove and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Wash beads as follows
steps.instruction: Wash beads as follows.

steps.title: With the plate on the magnetic...
steps.instruction: With the plate on the magnetic stand, add 200 µl fresh 80% EtOH without mixing.

steps.title: Incubate for 30 seconds
steps.instruction: Incubate for 30 seconds.

steps.title: Without disturbing the beads, remove and discard supernatant
steps.instruction: Without disturbing the beads, remove and discard supernatant.

steps.title: Wash beads a second time
steps.instruction: Wash beads a second time.

steps.title: Use a 20 µl pipette to...
steps.instruction: Use a 20 µl pipette to remove and discard residual EtOH.

steps.title: Air-dry on the magnetic stand for 5 minutes
steps.instruction: Air-dry on the magnetic stand for 5 minutes.

steps.title: Remove from the magnetic stand
steps.instruction: Remove from the magnetic stand.

steps.title: Add 32 µl RSB to the beads
steps.instruction: Add 32 µl RSB to the beads.

steps.title: Pipette to resuspend
steps.instruction: Pipette to resuspend.

steps.title: Incubate at room temperature for 2 minutes
steps.instruction: Incubate at room temperature for 2 minutes.

steps.title: Place the plate on the magnetic...
steps.instruction: Place the plate on the magnetic stand and wait until the liquid is clear (~2 minutes).

steps.title: Transfer 30 µl supernatant to a new 96-well PCR plate
steps.instruction: Transfer 30 µl supernatant to a new 96-well PCR plate. SAFE STOPPING POINT If you are stopping, seal the plate with Microseal 'B' adhesive seal or Microseal 'F' foil seal, and store at ‑25°C to ‑15°C for up to 30 days.

steps.title: SAFE STOPPING POINT If you are...
steps.instruction: SAFE STOPPING POINT If you are stopping, seal the plate with Microseal 'B' adhesive seal or Microseal 'F' foil seal, and store at ‑25°C to ‑15°C for up to 30 days.

steps.title: Pool Libraries Combine 5-10 ul of libraries
steps.instruction: Pool Libraries Combine 5-10 ul of libraries. Dilute pooled libraries according to the Illumina Denature and dilute protocols.
